sn22.19:1.1:
1
At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, form is suffering. The cause and condition for the arising of form is also suffering. As form has originated from what is suffering, how could it be happiness?
sn22.19:1.2:
"Feeling is suffering … . Perception is suffering … . Volitional formations are suffering … .
Consciousness is suffering. The cause and condition for the arising of consciousness is also suffering. As consciousness has originated from what is suffering, how could it be happiness?
sn22.19:1.3: "Seeing thus … He understands: ‘ … there is no more for this state of being.’"
